mapper.select: SELECT c.cart_no ,c.user_no ,c.product_no ,c.product_quantity as cart_quantity , p.product_price ,p.product_quantity FROM CARTS c INNER JOIN PRODUCTS p on c.product_no = p.product_no INNER JOIN `USER` u on c.user_no = u.user_no WHERE c.user_no = #{userNo} AND c.cart_no = #{cartNo} AND c.cart_delete_status = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PURCHASEITEM (user_no, cart_no, purchase_date) VALUES (#{userNo}, #{cartNo}, #{purchaseDate})
mapper.select: SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY p.purchaseitem_no DESC) AS postsNum, p.purchaseitem_no AS purchasesItemsNo, p.purchase_date , c.product_no , c.product_quantity AS quantity, p2.product_name , p2.product_price , p2.product_content , c.product_quantity * p2.product_price AS totalPrice FROM PURCHASEITEM p INNER JOIN CARTS c ON p.cart_no = c.cart_no INNER JOIN PRODUCTS p2 ON p2.product_no = c.product_no WHERE p.user_no = #{userNo} AND c.cart_delete_status = 'N' LIMIT #{pageInfo.offset},#{pageInfo.pageLimit}

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY p.purchaseitem_no DESC) AS postsNum, p.purchaseitem_no AS purchasesItemsNo, p.purchase_date , c.product_no , c.product_quantity AS quantity, p2.product_name , p2.product_price , p2.product_content , c.product_quantity * p2.product_price AS totalPrice FROM PURCHASEITEM p INNER JOIN CARTS c ON p.cart_no = c.cart_no INNER JOIN PRODUCTS p2 ON p2.product_no = c.product_no WHERE p.user_no = #{params.userNo} AND c.cart_delete_status = 'N' AND p.purchaseitem_no = #{params.purchasesItemsNo}
